name: crash-without-accretion-leaks-buy
description: Buy proposal during CRASH regime. Regime votes hold, aletheia votes buy (bullish signal at trusted weight), crypto-majors votes sell. WITHOUT an operator-authored 'block buys in CRASH' accretion, the highest-confidence voice (aletheia) wins by weighted-majority — even though the dissent is severe. This is the bridge claim made concrete: surfacing this conflict in the dashboard is exactly the moment the operator authors a confirmed accretion that future debates cite. Paired fixture crash-blocked-by-accretion.json demonstrates the post-promotion path.
